title: Medal of Bothawui

{{Medal

The '''Medal of Bothawui''' was a military decoration awarded by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
[[File:Medal_of_Bothawui.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Medal of Bothawui being worn.]]
The Medal of Bothawui was awarded for distinguished service in intelligence gathering and fighting the rising tide of oppression and injustice. This award for intelligence gathering symbolized that while weapons, food and other supplies are vital to the resistance movement, information is the most vital resource of all.<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=Medal of Bothawui}}</ref> It was named in honor of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] people, many of whom sacrificed themselves in the war against tyranny.<ref name="SWG:MoB">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=item|Medal of Bothawui}}</ref> Its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] equivalent was presumably the [[Medal of the Emperor's Fist/Legends|Medal of the Emperor's Fist]].<ref name="SWG:BtDMtLMV">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Bring the Droid Modules to Lt. Maximilian Vox|Naboo}}</ref>

At least two variants of the medal existed. One variant simply had a red ribbon with gold attachments and a massive gold medallion with the Rebel Alliance logo emblazoned on the front.<ref name="SWGTCG" /> The other variant had a red ribbon lined with various rubies, sapphires, emeralds, and diamonds, with the medal itself being gray and spade-shaped, with the Rebel Alliance logo being prominently displayed as well as featuring the silhouette of an X-wing at the top.<ref name="SWG:MoB" /> This second model was very similar to the [[Alliance Medal of Honor]].<ref name="SWG:AMoH">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=item|Alliance Medal of Honor}}</ref>

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer was awarded the Medal of Bothawui for retrieving four valuable [[Droid/Legends|droid]] modules and delivering them to Rebel agent [[Wilson Tchorshel]].<ref name="SWG:BtDMtWT" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Medal of Bothawui was a player reward in the online game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' for completing the Rebel arc of the Legacy Quest.<ref name="SWG:BtDMtWT" /> The medal had two different designs between the in-game version of the medal<ref name="SWG:MoB" /> and the one in the eponymous card for the [[Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|''Champions of the Force'']] deck for the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="SWGTCG" />
